#UFC
https://t.co/N7XYz1NXl4

RT @BitcoinVeterans: Thanks to everyone in the community that’s donated.
We were met by this amazing man with tears his eyes. We restored…

Maybe dictatorship wording was a little off. But, IMO he’s surrounding himself with people that will not transfer the power of a free and fair election next time. I think Jan 6 event was planned to not transfer the power, but was botched. That’s why Mile Pence isn’t his VP now https://t.co/EHQhNkLzcW

https://t.co/ph0vipIC3o

American politics in a nutshell
Israel Burns children alive and our politicians gave Benjamin Netanyahu 58 standing ovations https://t.co/K2uNvmDhIE

They said mean things about Jews as Jews killed their children
This antisemitism is out of control https://t.co/ub9XKGZqZG

Seminar this Sunday Oct 20th
I’m back with another seminar announcement. This Sunday, Oct 20th I’ll be in Oceanside, CA at @10thplanetoceanside doing an epic 3 hr seminar. Come through and learn some dark arts from the SMASH system. https://t.co/AZ69cdUMAa

RT @atsboxing: “We really dug deep into [Caleb’s] story… It has a lot of pain, a lot of trauma; but it also has a lot of triumphs.”
Y’all…
Any audience questions for Paulo Costa?

RT @ComicDaveSmith: 69% of Americans have absolutely no or very little trust in the corporate media.
31% of Americans are retarded.
How every much you hate them it’s not nearly enough https://t.co/qXH40F1T7s
In Halloween mode, I wonder what I’m going to dress up as. 🎃👻 What about you? https://t.co/q81afqThYC
RT @NickJFuentes: Virtually all of the recent pushback against DEI and wokeism has been downstream from powerful Jews who are furious that…
RT @TopLobsta: POV: You politely asked her to lower her Bluetooth speaker https://t.co/6srKB6NI60
RT @ggreenwald: The potency of propaganda is amazing. I'd bet most Americans don't know that Israel was bombing Gaza throughout 2023 **befo…
So how about you stop sending Israel bombs to support their genocide https://t.co/scvpxEQeqa
RT @Catthatdrivez: @AdamCarollaShow @mayhemmiller Great show! Love Mayhem on news! Also that Pipko lady was is so hot.

RT @AdamCarollaShow: “You get butt cancer cause your body can only handle so much meat” - @mayhemmiller
😂🥩 https://t.co/R3C8NI0vL2

https://t.co/xWMdhJLUmg

Dustin Poirier reveals recent near-altercation with Conor McGregor in Las Vegas 😳 #UFC
https://t.co/F2WjGnOcMn

David Duke is very sickened by all the dead Palestinian children
Just because you agree with him on many issues why would you reject his endorsement?
He can be the bigger person and see stopping a genocide as the most important issue
Why can’t you? https://t.co/NQqFkDM1tl

Do you think changes should be made to the UFC rankings? 🤔 #UFC #MMA
https://t.co/BskYte7hMc

Ilia Topuria intends to move to lightweight after facing Max Holloway 👀 #UFC308 #MMA
https://t.co/t7quXy20Gr

Brendan Schaub provides heartbreaking update on Shane Carwin 👇 #UFC #MMA
https://t.co/BNwTtcI6xb

Should I bring David Duke on to address this?
I constantly hear that he Is evil but he's deplayformed on all social media so he's unable to say his views
Maybe I should hear what he actually says and not what they tell me he says. https://t.co/NQqFkDM1tl
Bring David Duke on
I'll follow what the poll says https://t.co/TI6caVfm3u

Netflix releases Jake Paul vs. Mike Tyson trailer 👀 #PaulTyson #Boxing
https://t.co/mUDPnDMDRo

https://t.co/qNFTSAOlGE

https://t.co/umSVYeRMVX

https://t.co/FJghcjrlvq

😎🔥 https://t.co/T4OblgG0Xd

https://t.co/zihf63NlXO

https://t.co/qRtzWD5xmX

RT @deadlightsout: @MattSerraUFC @FrankieEdgar
Gentlemen…
I’m about to start this but if you fucko’s don’t have Bloodsport and Kickboxer…
Yup. 🎯 https://t.co/XnBo5wDTIi

Company fighters that got special treatment from the company sticking up for the company.
I’m so surprised. https://t.co/ns5g60lEfe
RT @davidfrum: Below is a fascinating example of Trump supporters' fantasy world. They tell a story of Trump charity to Nelson Mandela that…
RT @Denis_Buchholz: Trump stole 2.8 million from veterans charity! Found guilty in court and must pay it back
Mac returns?! 🔥 #UFC #MMA https://t.co/EUCx5AfDVm
Do you agree? 👀 #UFC #MMA https://t.co/JU8cKnDn2r

I’ve never really paid attention. I just try to put out facts and some opinions. MAGA crowd gets pretty angry about the facts part, and the opinion, but facts aren’t very friendly to them https://t.co/43Y4isqZfT
This would be huge! 👊 #UFC #MMA https://t.co/xD3UMIpt9U
Dana isn't interested 😬 #UFC #MMA https://t.co/4QnviTfqGT
MAHA is such a joke. 2 things Trump doesn’t give a fuck about, people health and the environment. Lost all respect for @RealRFKJR2024 selling his soul for some power and a job https://t.co/Tkf2EZc2aD
We learned a long time ago internet tough guys are a waste of time https://t.co/uYo86C8QSS
Cheers mate. I wear a prosthetic piece these days. Thanks for the kind words. https://t.co/jfJyCODW5e

Back on the tampon thing again. You guys will just keep beaten a dead horse. Women’s prison thing…… I have no idea what you’re talking about. It sounds like stupid MAGA talking point and it’s hard to keep up with all of those https://t.co/E3ooz07ejg
Did Donald Trump lose the 2020 election? True or False https://t.co/w83yK2kGX2

Haven’t really thought about prison policies that much. I think you should play sports with the gender you’re born with if that answers your question. I think prison there’s a lot of raping going on in general https://t.co/jQAWniqoZR
Like I said, facts are hard for you guys. All good, believe what you want https://t.co/pu1UlWwFUp
Great source 🤦 https://t.co/GaK5MjgEog
Thanks Justin. Hope it’s a temporary thing for you but if it’s not you’ll figure it out mate. All the best. https://t.co/aca1W5tZ6J

I can honestly say if she doesn’t lead our country correctly, we can vote her out. No one can say that for Trump. There’s a chance he could leave, there’s a chance he overthrows the American government. MAGA people like that chance https://t.co/SoaAQMaaIc
No, he couldn’t do it last time. This time he has a new VP and whole new administration that will follow through https://t.co/PHt12HMurk

Mundell is built for bare knuckles
Mundell is the champ and I’m not surprised. He has been in a groove for a while and looking like he was meant for bare knuckles. Christie is no chump so the win is even more impressive. Who do you see that might give Mundell a run for his… https://t.co/hKW73TTVpv https://t.co/xJ3BuCkpVQ

#UFC
https://t.co/i3VpeKM7U6

My answer was, I have no idea about that issue. Hard to respond to something with my only information is what you said. I gave you an answer about sports….. I have no idea about prison my man. It’s a weird question that I don’t want to think about https://t.co/AwNBzH8uoc
Israel is now destroying Lebanon https://t.co/d1eSdKHdnn

#UFC308
https://t.co/FAb6LoUcnG

2% of the population gets 94% of the grants https://t.co/Yj4FGYI7Uw

Yeah used to now and again. It’s a bit of a drive so I’d prefer to just walk out my door and run. I go for walks up there now though every time I’m back. Beautiful area. https://t.co/28CsFsIoew

RT @shaunonsite: I filmed one of Jon's seminars. If you're in the area and want some wisdom, PLEASE go! This man is a genius!

The outside step High C
The high crotch takedown can be a bit sticky if you aren’t very good at it. If you put in the work and get good with it then the outside step entry can level it up even more. https://t.co/fWEXSwoJYS
